title: Melon Pan
description: A Japanese melon pan, also known as melon bread, features a crispy cookie-like exterior and a soft, fluffy interior. This recipe combines the unique texture of a melon pan with some of the sweetness of chocolate.
instructions: Combine the flour, yeast, salt, and sugar in a large mixing bowl.
Heat the butter and let it cool slightly.
Add the butter to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a round or oblong shape.
Bake the melon pan for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove the melon pan from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Dip the melon pan in melted chocolate for an extra sweet treat.
